title: RusticDelight: Refabricated
description: This Mod is unofficial port based on the original Forge mod Rustic Delight
body:
### This mod has been stopping update please go to [Rustic Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/rustic-delight) to get Fabric version

This Mod is unofficial port based on the original Forge mod [Rustic Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/rustic-delight) and this work is licensed under the [MIT License](https://github.com/PhantomWing/RusticDelight/blob/version/1.21/LICENSE.txt). This License allows me to port it to Fabric.
This Mod needs [Farmer's Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) to work.


# Features
- Add new crops: Cotton and Bell Peppers. Cotton can be found in Forest and Bell Peppers in Jungle.
- Add new Foods.
- Add new Blocks.


If have any issues with this port, refer to me directly on discord or GItHub please:
Finally, special thanks to** PhantomWing **for creating this excellent mod!
